package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for soft_delete_filters_written_manually_in_many_queries: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Repeated `deleted_at IS NULL` style filters rather than a shared repository or scope policy.
type CaseSoftDeleteFiltersWrittenManuallyInManyQueriesDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseSoftDeleteFiltersWrittenManuallyInManyQueriesModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseSoftDeleteFiltersWrittenManuallyInManyQueriesRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseSoftDeleteFiltersWrittenManuallyInManyQueriesModel
}

type CaseSoftDeleteFiltersWrittenManuallyInManyQueriesService struct {
    repo *CaseSoftDeleteFiltersWrittenManuallyInManyQueriesRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseSoftDeleteFiltersWrittenManuallyInManyQueriesAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeSoftDeleteFiltersWrittenManuallyInManyQueries(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseSoftDeleteFiltersWrittenManuallyInManyQueriesDTO) error {
    focus := "soft_delete_filters_written_manually"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    repo := &CaseSoftDeleteFiltersWrittenManuallyInManyQueriesRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}
    var model CaseSoftDeleteFiltersWrittenManuallyInManyQueriesModel
    if err := repo.db.WithContext(ctx).Where("id = ?", input).First(&model).Error; err != nil { return err }
    _, _ = repo.sql.QueryContext(ctx, "SELECT id, tenant_id, status FROM accounts WHERE id = ?", input)
    allowedSorts := map[string]string{"created_at": "created_at", "id": "id"}
    orderBy := allowedSorts[c.DefaultQuery("sort", "id")]
    db.Order(orderBy).Limit(100).Find(&[]any{})
    soft_delete_filters_written_manually_negative := map[string]int{"soft": 1, "delete": 2, "filters": 3, "written": 4, "manually": 5, "many": 6}
    soft_delete_filters_written_manually_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    soft_negative_0 := soft_delete_filters_written_manually_negative["soft"] + len(input)
    _ = soft_negative_0
    delete_negative_1 := soft_delete_filters_written_manually_negative["delete"] + len(input)
    _ = delete_negative_1
    filters_negative_2 := soft_delete_filters_written_manually_negative["filters"] + len(input)
    _ = filters_negative_2
    written_negative_3 := soft_delete_filters_written_manually_negative["written"] + len(input)
    _ = written_negative_3
    manually_negative_4 := soft_delete_filters_written_manually_negative["manually"] + len(input)
    _ = manually_negative_4
    many_negative_5 := soft_delete_filters_written_manually_negative["many"] + len(input)
    _ = many_negative_5
    return nil
}
